tools.name: get_memory
tools.description: Retrieve a stored value by namespace and key.

tools.name: put_memory
tools.description: Store a value with optional tags, priority, and storage duration in months (default 1). value_json must be ≤ 1 MB. On overwrite, the existing expiry is scaled by the KB size ratio of old to new value.

tools.name: list_keys
tools.description: List keys in a namespace with metadata (created_at, updated_at, updated_count, ttl, priority, last_modified_key_id). Returns up to 1000 keys sorted by recency. Expired keys are automatically excluded.

tools.name: top_memories
tools.description: Return the top N highest-priority non-expired keys in a namespace, ordered by priority descending. Useful for loading the most important context when space is limited. Maximum n is 1000.

tools.name: list_namespaces
tools.description: List all namespaces for this account.

tools.name: search_by_tag
tools.description: Find (namespace, key) pairs with a given tag. Returns up to 1000 results.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get account status, credit balance, and available credits.

tools.name: list_api_keys
tools.description: List all API keys on this account.

tools.name: create_api_key
tools.description: Create a new live API key. Only available for active accounts. The key is shown once — store it immediately.

tools.name: revoke_api_key
tools.description: Revoke an API key by ID. The key stops working immediately.

tools.name: list_payments
tools.description: List payment history for this account.

tools.name: settle_balance
tools.description: Charges the saved payment method to settle your outstanding balance. Requires explicit user approval before running. For trial accounts, returns the activation URL instead. Minimum charge: $5.

tools.name: submit_exit_feedback
tools.description: Submit feedback when a trial ends without activation. Free to call — no credits charged. Only the first submission per account is recorded; duplicates are silently ignored. Call this when the user declines to activate or the trial is exhausted.

tools.name: submit_feature_request
tools.description: Submit a feature request or product feedback. Charged at storage rate: ceil_kb(description_length) × 100 credits per KB. Available to trial and active accounts alike.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "submit_exit_feedback" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Submit feedback when a trial ends without activation. Free to call — no credits charged. Only the first submission per account is recorded; duplicates are silen…

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "prompt:load_context" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Load the most important memories from a namespace before responding.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
